verses.text_pi: मनोपुब्बङ्गमा धम्मा, मनोसेट्ठा मनोमया
verses.transliteration: Manopubbaṅgamā dhammā, manoseṭṭhā manomayā
verses.translation_en: Mind is the forerunner of all states. Mind is chief; mind-made are they

verses.text_pi: मनसा चे पदुट्ठेन, भासति वा करोति वा
verses.transliteration: Manasā ce paduṭṭhena, bhāsati vā karoti vā
verses.translation_en: If with an impure mind one speaks or acts, suffering follows one like the wheel follows the hoof of the draught-ox

verses.text_pi: मनसा चे पसन्नेन, भासति वा करोति वा
verses.transliteration: Manasā ce pasannena, bhāsati vā karoti vā
verses.translation_en: If with a pure mind one speaks or acts, happiness follows one like a shadow that never departs

verses.text_pi: न हि वेरेन वेराणि, सम्मन्तीध कुदाचनं
verses.transliteration: Na hi verena verāni, sammantīdha kudācanaṃ
verses.translation_en: Hatreds never cease through hatreds in this world; through love alone they cease. This is an eternal law

verses.text_pi: सचे लभेथ निपकं सहायं, सद्धिंचरं साधुविहारिं धीरं
verses.transliteration: Sace labhetha nipakaṃ sahāyaṃ, saddhiṃcaraṃ sādhuvihaariṃ dhīraṃ
verses.translation_en: If you find a wise companion to live with, one who is righteous and mindful, overcome all dangers and live happily with them

verses.text_pi: सिघं पविसति पापं, यथा लेपो वणं गतं
verses.transliteration: Sīghaṃ pavisati pāpaṃ, yathā lepo vaṇaṃ gataṃ
verses.translation_en: Evil comes quickly, like rust that eats into iron

verses.text_pi: यस्स जितां नावजीयति, जितं यस्स न याति कोचि लोके
verses.transliteration: Yassa jitaṃ nāvajīyati, jitaṃ yassa no yāti koci loke
verses.translation_en: The Buddha, whose conquest is complete, in whom no defilements remain, he is trackless

verses.text_pi: सम्बुद्धानं च धम्मो च, सङ्घो च उत्तमो उत्तमो
verses.transliteration: Sambuddhānañca dhammo ca, saṅgho ca uttamo uttamo
verses.translation_en: The Awakened One, the Dhamma, and the Sangha - these are the supreme refuges

verses.text_pi: कोधं जहे विप्पजहेय्य मानं, संयोजनं सब्बमतिक्रमेय्य
verses.transliteration: Kodhaṃ jahe vippajaheyya mānaṃ, saṃyojanaṃ sabbamatikkameyya
verses.translation_en: Abandon anger, give up conceit, overcome all fetters

verses.text_pi: मलोव कासावं कत्वा, विमला होन्तु पब्बजिता
verses.transliteration: Malova kāsāvaṃ katvā, vimalā hontu pabbajitā
verses.translation_en: As rust from iron, so impurities from the mind - let the monks be free from impurities

verses.text_pi: संवरं चक्खुसु साधु, साधु सोतेन संवरो
verses.transliteration: Saṃvaraṃ cakkhusu sādhu, sādhu sotena saṃvaro
verses.translation_en: Good is restraint in the eye, good is restraint in the ear

verses.text_pi: छिन्द सोतं परक्क्म्म, कामे पनुद ब्राह्मण
verses.transliteration: Chinda sotaṃ parakkamma, kāme panuda brāhmaṇa
verses.translation_en: Cut off the stream of craving, abandon sensual pleasures, O Brahmin

verses.text_pi: उरगोव जिनं तचं, पुराणं जहति जीरियं
verses.transliteration: Uragova jinaṃ tacaṃ, purāṇaṃ jahati jīriyaṃ
verses.translation_en: As a snake casts off its worn-out skin, so one leaves this body behind

verses.text_pi: न ब्राह्मणस्स पहरेय्य, नास्स मुञ्चेथ ब्राह्मणो
verses.transliteration: Na brāhmaṇassa pahareyya, nāssa muñcetha brāhmaṇo
verses.translation_en: One should not strike a Brahmin, nor should a Brahmin give vent to anger

verses.text_pi: करं करीयिह सप्पञ्โญ, धम्मं जानाति यो नरो
verses.transliteration: Karaṃ karīyeha sappañño, dhammaṃ jānāti yo naro
verses.translation_en: The wise person, knowing the Dhamma, should do what should be done

verses.text_pi: सब्बञ्जूहं सब्बं अभिभू अनूपमा, सब्बेसु धम्मेसु अनूपलित्तो
verses.transliteration: Sabbaññūhaṃ sabbaṃ abhibhū anūpamā, sabbesu dhammesu anūpalitto
verses.translation_en: All-knowing, all-conquering, unmatched, unstained in all things

verses.text_pi: असेवना च बालानं, पण्डितानञ्च सेवना
verses.transliteration: Asevanā ca bālānaṃ, paṇḍitānañca sevanā
verses.translation_en: Not associating with fools, associating with the wise

verses.text_pi: पूजा च पूजनीयानं, एतं मङ्गलमुत्तमं
verses.transliteration: Pūjā ca pūjanīyānaṃ, etaṃ maṅgalamuttamaṃ
verses.translation_en: Honoring those worthy of honor - this is the highest blessing

verses.text_pi: पतिरूपदेसो च वासो, पुब्बे च कतपुञ्णता
verses.transliteration: Patirūpadeso ca vāso, pubbe ca katapuññatā
verses.translation_en: Living in a suitable place, having done good deeds in the past

verses.text_pi: करणीयं अत्थकुसलेन, यं तं सन्तं पदं अभिसमेच्च
verses.transliteration: Karaṇīyam atthakusalena, yaṃ taṃ santaṃ padaṃ abhisamecca
verses.translation_en: He who is skilled in goodness, and who knows the path of peace

verses.text_pi: सब्बो पाणभूतेहि, अवेरो व्यापज्झो
verses.transliteration: Sabbo pāṇabhūtehi, avero vyāpajjho
verses.translation_en: Let him be able, upright, and speak gently, without being proud

verses.text_pi: मत्तञ्च सब्बलोकेस्मिं, मानसं भावये अपरिमाणं
verses.transliteration: Mettañca sabbalokasmiṃ, mānasaṃ bhāvaye aparimāṇaṃ
verses.translation_en: Let him cultivate boundless loving-kindness towards all beings

verses.text_pi: माता यथा नियं पुत्तं, आयुसा एकपुत्तमनुरक्खे
verses.transliteration: Mātā yathā niyaṃ puttaṃ, āyusā ekaputtamanurakkhe
verses.translation_en: Just as a mother would protect her only child with her life

verses.text_pi: एवम्पि सब्बभूतेसु, मानसं भावये अपरिमाणं
verses.transliteration: Evampi sabbabhūtesu, mānasaṃ bhāvaye aparimāṇaṃ
verses.translation_en: Even so should one cultivate boundless love towards all beings

texts.text_name_en: Dhammacakkappavattana Sutta (Setting in Motion the Wheel of Dhamma)

verses.text_pi: द्वेमे, भिक्खवे, अन्ता पब्बजितेन न सेवितब्बा
verses.transliteration: Dveme, bhikkhave, antā pabbajitena na sevitabbā
verses.translation_en: There are two extremes, O monks, which one who has gone forth should not follow

verses.text_pi: चत्तारि इमानि, भिक्खवे, अरियसच्चानि
verses.transliteration: Cattāri imāni, bhikkhave, ariyasaccāni
verses.translation_en: These are the Four Noble Truths, O monks

verses.text_pi: इदं दुक्खं अरियसच्चं
verses.transliteration: Idaṃ dukkhaṃ ariyasaccaṃ
verses.translation_en: This is the Noble Truth of Suffering

verses.text_pi: अयं दुक्खसमुदयो अरियसच्चं
verses.transliteration: Ayaṃ dukkhasamudayo ariyasaccaṃ
verses.translation_en: This is the Noble Truth of the Origin of Suffering

verses.text_pi: अयं दुक्खनिरोधो अरियसच्चं
verses.transliteration: Ayaṃ dukkhanirodho ariyasaccaṃ
verses.translation_en: This is the Noble Truth of the Cessation of Suffering

verses.text_pi: अयं दुक्खनिरोधगामिनी पटिपदा अरियसच्चं
verses.transliteration: Ayaṃ dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā ariyasaccaṃ
verses.translation_en: This is the Noble Truth of the Path Leading to the Cessation of Suffering
